brand_identity.name: Drops Curated
brand_identity.vibe: Digital boutique, luxury, warm minimalist, exclusive

rules: Use Playfair Display for all expressive typography and section headers.
Use Inter for functional data: prices, sizes, labels, and navigation links.
Always apply 'tracking-tight' to headings larger than 32px.
The primary background must strictly be #FDFBF7 to establish the warm, premium eggshell canvas.
Use #001F3F (Deep Navy) instead of black for all dark text to add depth and elegance.
Use #D4AF37 (Antique Gold) sparingly as an accent for verified badges, 'Subscribe' CTA borders, or micro-interactions.
Ensure high contrast. Normal text must meet 4.5:1 against #FDFBF7.

spacing.strategy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical e-commerce.

patterns.hero: Asymmetrical editorial layout. Huge serif text spanning 6 columns, with an overlapping hero image on the right. High negative space.
patterns.product_grid: Bento Grid Protocol (Tetris Mode) for featured drops. Use varying spans (e.g., col-span-full for hero drop, col-span-4 for standard drops) to break symmetry. No borders on the cards, let the image shine against the eggshell background.
patterns.price_comparison: Grid Borders strategy. Expose the skeleton with 1px borders (border-[#001F3F]/10) for a clean, technical, high-fashion spec-sheet vibe.

surfaces.header: Crystal Glassmorphism. bg-[#FDFBF7]/85 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#001F3F]/10. CRITICAL: NEVER use a completely transparent background.
surfaces.cards: Cardless design. Do not use standard Shadcn Card component wrapping. Just render the image container and text below it. Use flat backgrounds with NO default shadows to mimic high-end fashion boutiques.
surfaces.modals: Solid #FDFBF7 background with a delicate 1px border-[#D4AF37]/20 and soft, diffuse ambient shadow.

hover_states: Product Images: Subtle scale 'hover:scale-105' wrapped in an 'overflow-hidden' container. Duration 500ms ease-out.
Buttons: Translate Y lift '-translate-y-1' and shadow expansion 'shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,31,63,0.15)]'.
motion.page_transitions: Staggered fade-up for product grids. Soft opacity and Y-axis translation.
rules: Use specific transitions (e.g., 'transition-transform duration-500 ease-out'). NEVER use 'transition: all'.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) or completely sharp edges (rounded-none) for a brutalist luxury feel. Default CTA: bg-[#001F3F] text-[#FDFBF7] hover:bg-[#001F3F]/90.
components.badges: Minimalist. border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] bg-transparent text-xs uppercase tracking-widest px-3 py-1 rounded-full.
components.icons: Use Lucide React. Set stroke-width to 1.5 or 1 for a delicate, refined look. NEVER use emojis.

accessibility.contrast: All text must pass WCAG AA standards. Navy (#001F3F) against Eggshell (#FDFBF7) provides excellent contrast.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'data-testid="subscribe-cta"').
accessibility.focus: Focus states must be visible: 'focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] focus:outline-none'.

image_urls.description: Elegant close-up of premium sneakers, showcasing luxury branding. Perfect for the main landing page hero.
Man wearing high-end streetwear jacket near a textured wall. Use in the featured drops grid.
Model wearing streetwear fashion t-shirt in urban setting. Use in the product grid.
Beautifully styled fashion display in a luxurious boutique setting. Use for the Brand Directory header or background.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Write components in .js or .jsx, NOT .tsx (TypeScript is not used).
Do not build standard e-commerce UI. Avoid generic 'Add to Cart' grids. Drops Curated is a discovery platform for curated drops. Build it like an editorial magazine.
Implement Shadcn UI, but strip Vercel-like borders and soft rounding. Override defaults to match the Warm Minimalist luxury aesthetic.
The Subscribe page must include a form to capture WhatsApp numbers and integrate a mockup for UPI payment processing.
Ensure 'Lucide React' is used for all icons. NO EMOJIS.
Use standard semantic HTML sections combined with Tailwind CSS for layouts. Only use Shadcn for complex interactive logic like Select, Dialog, or Forms.
For the Product Detail Page, build a pristine, minimal 'Price Comparison Table' using the Grid Borders strategy (1px navy borders) instead of standard table formatting.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx.
